def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) for per-code time-series operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])
    
    # Ts_Rank of close over 10-day window (per code)
    ts_rank_close = ts_rank(pl.col('close'), window=10)
    
    # Cross-sectional rank of the Ts_Rank
    rank1 = rank(ts_rank_close).over('date')
    
    # close / open ratio
    ratio = pl.col('close') / pl.col('open')
    
    # Cross-sectional rank of the ratio
    rank2 = rank(ratio).over('date')
    
    # Final factor: -1 * rank1 * rank2
    factor = -1 * rank1 * rank2
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
